title: これがカレンの勝負服

text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Big Bro. Wake up! Hey!
...Hey, Big Sis. Wake up! Hey!

Overwhelmingly tired, I open my eyes. Blinded by
the light, I make out a girl dressed in black and
white. She's smiling, and I feel myself strangely
drawn to her.
choice_data_list: Are you an angel? Or... a demon?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can be whichever one you want. ♪ But for
now...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll be whichever one you want. ♪ But for
now...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan Chop!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There! You're finally awake. Morning,
sleepyhead! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There! You're finally awake. Morning,
sleepyhead! ♪

Her whack brings me back to reality. I guess I
nodded off.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't you remember?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't you remember?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This is my signature racewear! We made it
together!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, you did pass out the second we finished, so
I'm not surprised you forgot. You sure were tired.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, you did pass out the second we finished, so
I'm not surprised you forgot. You sure were tired.

What in the world happened to me? Come to
think of it, Curren Chan and I were looking at
some samples for her signature racewear a few
days ago...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...It's not enough.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, the racewear itself is wonderful. I can tell
the person who made it really poured their heart
into making it the way I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... it's still not enough. My signature racewear
needs an extra oomph of cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now the rest is up to me... and you, of course!
We've got work to do!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So actually... I've got a favor to ask. Do you
mind?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So actually... I've got a favor to ask. Do you
mind?

That's right! I remember now! Curren Chan asked
for something insane after that, and I had no
choice but to accept.
choice_data_list:
(Search the sea for a legendary piece of
fabric...)

(Go deep in the mountains to collect a
miraculous dye...)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That fabric is made from pearls. I heard there's a
type of pearl in a certain ocean that can be used
to create fabric that shines beautifully if crushed
and mixed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That said, it's not a very noticeable shine. It's
more of a "if you know, you know" type of thing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But just imagine it. A mystical light emitting from
me while I run... Think of the impression that'd
leave!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's perfect, just what I need! Come look for it
with me! Pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's perfect, just what I need! Come look for it
with me! Pleeeaaase!
And so, we go to an unexplored patch of ocean...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I heard you can only get it if you free dive. Can I
even do it? I dunno, it's kinda scary...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Really?! You're the best! ♪ I'll stay here and be
the best cheerleader ever!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Go, Big Bro! Go, Big Bro! Go! ♪ Fight on! Fight
on! Over there! You can do it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Go, Big Sis! Go, Big Sis! Go! ♪ Fight on! Fight on!
Over there! You can do it! ♪

I dive again countless times, completely
exhausting myself. Finally, I manage to find the
pearl Curren Chan wants.
I remember everything now! That's how we finished Curren Chan's signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's all because of your hard work that my
signature racewear turned out so good. Thank
you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's all because of your hard work that my
signature racewear turned out so good. Thank
you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sooo... Whaddya think? Do I look cute?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sooo... Whaddya think? Do I look cute?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Yay! I absolutely love it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure I win a bunch wearing this. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure I win a bunch wearing this. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I want the color of my signature racewear to be
perfect. Not just any old dye will do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I heard there's a flower deep in the mountains
that's been around for a thousand years.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
They say that if you use it to dye fabric, it'll turn
into a color that captivates anyone who lays eyes
on it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But apparently, you have to go past a bunch of
booby traps to get to it...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It could be a dangerous trip. But... I need that
flower no matter what! Will you come with me?
Pleeease!

I can certainly see her resolve and passion...
However, I can't just bring her somewhere
dangerous. What I should do is...
choice_data_list: I'll go find it for you!
I'll go find it for you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks, but... are you sure you'll be okay by
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I'll be waiting, so don't take too long. I
believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I'll be waiting, so don't take too long. I
believe in you!

And so, I hike deep into the unexplored
mountains, avoiding so many deadly traps that I
lose count...

I remember everything now! That's how we
finished Curren Chan's signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, whaddya think? Do I look... captivating?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, whaddya think? Do I look... captivating?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, good. It's because you work so hard for
me that I can achieve my dream.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, good. It's because you work so hard for
me that I can achieve my dream.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll captivate everyone even more with this outfit
and never let them go. So, Big Bro...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll captivate everyone even more with this outfit
and never let them go. So, Big Sis...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just keep me in your heart, okay? ♪
